EnableTracking.title: Application Insights
EnableTracking.description: Enable/ disable Azure Application Insights for the store

InstrumentationKey.title: Instrumentation key
InstrumentationKey.description: Enter the instrumentation key of your AppInsights resource on Azure. The default value is automatically loaded from the connection string

ApplicationInsightsUrl.title: Application Insights URL
ApplicationInsightsUrl.description: Link to the Application Insights resource
